recipes.name: Chicken Fried Rice
instructions: Cook rice and let it cool completely.
Dice chicken breast into small pieces, season with salt.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat, cook chicken until golden. Set aside.
Scramble eggs in the same wok, set aside.
Add garlic and diced carrot, stir-fry 2 minutes.
Add cold rice, soy sauce, sesame oil. Toss on high heat 3 minutes.
Return chicken and eggs, add green onions. Toss and serve.

recipes.name: Pasta Aglio e Olio
instructions: Boil spaghetti in salted water until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.
Slice garlic thinly. Heat olive oil on medium-low, cook garlic until golden.
Add red pepper flakes, cook 30 seconds.
Add drained pasta and 1/2 cup pasta water. Toss vigorously.
Add parsley, parmesan, toss. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Vegetable Stir Fry
instructions: Cut all vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
Mix soy sauce, cornstarch and 2 tbsp water for sauce.
Heat oil in wok on high heat. Add garlic and ginger, cook 30 sec.
Add carrots first (2 min), then broccoli and bell pepper (2 min), then mushrooms (1 min).
Pour sauce over, toss 1 minute until glossy. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Classic Pancakes
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt in a bowl.
Whisk milk, egg, melted butter, vanilla separately.
Combine wet and dry ingredients. Do not overmix.
Heat a non-stick pan on medium. Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake.
Cook until bubbles form on surface (2 min), flip, cook 1 more minute.
Serve with maple syrup, berries, or whipped cream.

recipes.name: Caesar Salad
instructions: Grill or pan-sear chicken breast, slice thinly.
For dressing: whisk egg yolk, minced garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper.
Chop romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
Toss lettuce with dressing. Add shaved parmesan and croutons.
Top with sliced chicken. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Tomato Soup
instructions: Halve tomatoes, place on baking sheet with olive oil. Roast at 400F for 15 min.
Saute diced onion and garlic in a pot until soft.
Add roasted tomatoes, broth, sugar. Simmer 10 minutes.
Blend until smooth with immersion blender.
Stir in cream and basil. Season with salt and pepper. Serve with bread.

recipes.name: Egg Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs with salt and pepper.
Saute diced mushrooms, bell pepper, onion in butter for 2 minutes.
Pour eggs over vegetables. Cook on medium-low.
When edges set, add cheese. Fold in half.
Cook 30 more seconds. Slide onto plate.

recipes.name: Butter Chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt, turmeric, chili powder, salt for 15 min.
Grill or pan-sear marinated chicken until charred. Set aside.
Melt butter, saute onion until golden. Add garlic, ginger paste.
Add tomato puree, garam masala. Simmer 10 minutes.
Add cream, stir. Add cooked chicken pieces.
Simmer 10 more minutes. Garnish with cream and cilantro. Serve with naan or rice.

recipes.name: Guacamole
instructions: Halve avocados, remove pit, scoop into bowl.
Mash with fork to desired consistency.
Add diced onion, tomato, minced jalapeno, garlic, cilantro.
Squeeze lime juice, add salt. Mix gently.
Serve immediately with tortilla chips.

recipes.name: Banana Smoothie
instructions: Peel bananas and break into chunks.
Add all ingredients to blender.
Blend on high for 1 minute until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place one slice butter-side down in a skillet over medium heat.
Add cheese slices on top. Place second bread slice butter-side up.
Cook 3-4 minutes until golden brown. Flip carefully.
Cook another 3-4 minutes until cheese melts. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C).
Cream butter, sugar, and brown sugar until fluffy.
Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
Mix flour, baking soda, salt. Add to wet mixture gradually.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Drop rounded tablespoons onto baking sheet.
Bake 9-12 minutes until golden edges. Cool on wire rack.

recipes.name: Dal Tadka
instructions: Wash lentils. Pressure cook with turmeric, salt and 3 cups water for 3 whistles.
For tadka: heat ghee, add cumin seeds, dried red chili.
Add chopped onion, cook until golden. Add garlic and ginger.
Add chopped tomatoes, cook until soft.
Pour tadka over cooked dal. Mix well.
Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice or roti.

recipes.name: Fish Tacos
instructions: Season fish with chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, salt.
Heat olive oil in skillet. Cook fish 3-4 min per side until flaky.
Shred cabbage, toss with lime juice.
Mix sour cream with a squeeze of lime for sauce.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan.
Assemble: tortilla, cabbage slaw, flaked fish, cream sauce, cilantro.

recipes.name: French Toast
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, vanilla, sugar in a bowl.
Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Dip each bread slice in egg mixture, coating both sides.
Cook 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown.
Serve with maple syrup and fresh berries.

recipes.name: Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Keep broth warm in a separate pot.
Saute mushrooms in olive oil until golden. Set aside.
Cook diced onion and garlic in butter until soft.
Toast rice for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add wine, stir until absorbed.
Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly for 18 minutes.
Fold in mushrooms, parmesan, and butter. Season and serve.

recipes.name: Hummus
instructions: Drain and rinse chickpeas.
Blend chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, salt in food processor.
Drizzle in olive oil while blending until smooth.
Add 2-3 tbsp ice water for creamier texture.
Transfer to bowl, garnish with paprika, olive oil. Serve with pita.

recipes.name: Chicken Biryani
instructions: Soak rice 30 min. Parboil until 70% cooked, drain.
Marinate chicken in yogurt, garam masala, turmeric, chili, salt.
Fry sliced onions in ghee until deep golden. Set half aside.
Add garlic-ginger paste, cook 2 min. Add tomatoes.
Add marinated chicken, cook 10 min until half done.
Layer: chicken at bottom, rice on top, fried onions, mint, saffron milk.
Seal pot, cook on low heat 25 min. Rest 5 min, then gently mix and serve.

recipes.name: Caprese Salad
instructions: Slice mozzarella and tomatoes into 1/4 inch rounds.
Arrange alternating slices of tomato and mozzarella on plate.
Tuck fresh basil leaves between slices.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Mango Lassi
instructions: Peel and dice mango.
Add mango, yogurt, milk, sugar, cardamom, ice to blender.
Blend until smooth and frothy.
Pour into glasses. Garnish with a pinch of cardamom.

recipes.name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Cook ground beef in skillet, breaking into crumbles.
Add diced onion and garlic, cook 3 minutes.
Add chili powder, cumin, salt. Stir well.
Add diced tomatoes, simmer 5 minutes.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan.
Assemble: tortilla, beef, lettuce, cheese, sour cream.

recipes.name: Tiramisu
instructions: Brew espresso and let it cool.
Separate eggs. Beat yolks with sugar until pale and thick.
Fold in mascarpone and vanilla until smooth.
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks. Fold into mascarpone mixture.
Dip ladyfingers briefly in espresso. Layer in dish.
Spread mascarpone mixture over ladyfingers. Repeat layers.
Dust with cocoa powder. Refrigerate 4 hours minimum. Serve cold.

recipes.name: Greek Salad
instructions: Dice cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion into chunks.
Add to bowl with olives.
Crumble feta cheese on top.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt for dressing.
Drizzle dressing over salad. Toss gently and serve.

recipes.name: Chicken Quesadilla
instructions: Cook diced chicken with cumin, chili powder, salt until done.
Saute diced bell pepper and onion until soft.
Place tortilla in skillet. Add cheese, chicken, peppers, onion on one half.
Fold tortilla in half. Cook 2-3 min per side until golden and cheese melts.
Cut into wedges. Serve with sour cream and salsa.

recipes.name: Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F (175C). Grease a loaf pan.
Mash bananas in a large bowl.
Mix in melted butter, sugar, egg, vanilla.
Add flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon. Stir until just combined.
Pour into loaf pan.
Bake 55-60 minutes until toothpick comes out clean.
Cool 10 minutes in pan, then transfer to wire rack.
